steps.title: Attach the name directly
steps.content: The phrase little-known French portrait artist is immediately followed by the proper name Marie-Denise Villers. Because the name identifies the artist, no punctuation should separate the title from the name.

steps.title: Remove unnecessary punctuation
steps.content:
• Choice A: Adds an em dash where no break is needed.
  • Choice B: Leaves the title and name directly connected.
  • Choice C: Adds a colon, but the name is not an explanation or list.
  • Choice D: Adds a comma that wrongly treats the name as optional.
The answer is B.
